# build_experiment_grid { #natural_features.build_experiment_grid }

```python
build_experiment_grid(
    tr_s,
    n_trs_by_run,
    run_starts_s=None,
    feature_t0_s=0.0,
    feature_t0_by_run=None,
    feature_clock=STIMULUS_CLOCK,
    experiment_clock='experiment',
    feature_to_experiment_by_run=None,
    start_s=0.0,
    run_gap_s=0.0,
)
```

Build simple experiment grid with per-run TR clocks.
